title: a job description/role profile for a cleaner/housekeeper working for a small boutique bed and breakfast in a village in …

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: a job description/role profile for a cleaner/housekeeper working for a small boutique bed and breakfast in a village in Wiltshire.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
Role Profile: Cleaner/Housekeeper at a Boutique Bed and Breakfast in Wiltshire

Overview:
Our small boutique bed and breakfast in a picturesque village in Wiltshire is looking for a reliable and proactive cleaner/housekeeper to join our team. You will be responsible for ensuring the rooms are clean, tidy and well-maintained to guarantee a comfortable and pleasant guest experience.

Key Responsibilities:
- Clean guest rooms to a high standard, including changing bed linen and towels
- Ensure all communal areas are clean, including the lounge, breakfast room, hallways, stairs and bathrooms
- Ensure all surfaces are dusted and polished, and floors are vacuumed or mopped as necessary
- Ensure bathrooms are clean and well-stocked with toiletries and fresh towels
- Maintain guest supply levels of tea, coffee, and other complementary items
- Report any maintenance issues to the management
- Maintain cleaning equipment and supplies
- Occasionally help with breakfast service or other duties as requested

Requirements:
- Proven experience in a similar role
- Ability to work independently and as part of a team
- Excellent attention to detail with strong organisational skills
- Good communication skills to liaise with guests and management
- Ability to work to deadlines and manage time effectively
- Good physical fitness & stamina to undertake cleaning tasks
- Flexibility to work weekends and possibly evenings
- Basic IT skills to work with online booking systems and email communication

Location and Hours:
This is a part-time position, with hours worked between 9:00am and 3:00pm, four days per week (approximately 16 hours per week). The bed and breakfast is located in a village in Wiltshire, and own transportation will be necessary.

Salary:
The salary offered is competitive and will be discussed during the interview process.

If you are passionate about creating a comfortable and welcoming experience for guests, and you enjoy working as part of a small team, we look forward to hearing from you.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: template of an employment contract for a for a cleaner/housekeeper that complies with English/UK/British employment law and conditions.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
Employment Contract: Cleaner/Housekeeper at a Boutique Bed and Breakfast in Wiltshire

This employment contract ("Agreement") is made and entered into between [Employer Name], a company duly registered under the laws of the United Kingdom, and having its principal office at [Address], and [Employee Name], with an address of [Address], on the following terms and conditions:

1. Position
The Employer hereby engages the Employee in the position of Cleaner/Housekeeper. The Employee shall perform the duties and responsibilities referred to in the job description attached to this Agreement as Schedule 1, and any other reasonable instructions given by the Employer from time to time.

2. Hours of Work
The Employee shall work [16] hours per week, over [4] days, as determined by the Employer. The hours of work may be varied by the Employer from time to time, by agreement with the Employee. The Employee acknowledges they may be required to work on weekends and possibly evenings.

3. Salary and Payment
The Employer shall pay the Employee a salary of [insert salary] per month, payable weekly by direct credit transfer into the Employee’s bank account. The Employee shall complete and provide the Employer with all necessary payroll information to enable payment, including any necessary tax and national insurance contributions.

4. Holidays
The Employee shall be entitled to [20] days holiday per year, plus bank holidays, which shall be taken at times as are mutually agreed with the Employer. Any holidays must be approved by the Employer in advance, taking into account the needs of the business.

5. Termination of Employment
a. The Employer may terminate this Agreement on [one] week written notice for any reason whatsoever. Alternatively, the Employer may terminate the Employee’s employment immediately for gross misconduct, non-performance or breach of this Agreement.
b. The Employee may terminate this Agreement on [one] week written notice.
c. The Employee shall not be entitled to any further pay or benefits after the termination of their employment, except as required by law.

6. Confidentiality
The Employee shall not at any time during or after their employment divulge to any person any confidential information or trade secrets concerning the business of the Employer or its clients, nor make use of such information to their advantage or the advantage of any other person.

7. No Conflict of Interest
The Employee shall not during the term of this Agreement engage in any other employment, business or activity which may conflict with their duties and obligations under this Agreement, or which would otherwise be detrimental to the business of the Employer.

8. Notice of Changes
The Employer may modify or amend the terms and conditions of this Agreement at any time, upon giving the Employee [two] weeks’ written notice of such changes.

9. Governing Law
This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of England and Wales.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the parties have executed this Agreement as of the date and year first above written.

EMPLOYER:
[Employer Name]

EMPLOYER REPRESENTATIVE:
_______________________________________
[Name and Title]

EMPLOYEE:
[Employee Name]
